reviews.review_description: This game is amazing please keep working on it and add more frog colors and types also it would be bundle if there were diferent modes with diferent animals

Cool little proof of concept demo with an innovative use of hand tracking. Cute animations and environment.

The hand tracking on occasion doesn't play nicely, and it would be nice to be able to control the frog remotely without so much reaching.

Looking forward to more levels, I would love to race time trial ghosts and have my time recorded to create more replayability.

Art style is perfection. The level design is well balanced between focused attention and relaxing tranquility. It reminds me of some of the old Nintendo DS games I used to play. It's honestly amazing to me that something like this is completely free to play. I heard the dev team made it in record time too! Show your support and give it a shot.

This demo is pretty polished! I love the creative use of hand-tracking, and I really like that it's mixed reality. Studio Syro is known for making awesome VR animations, so I'm excited to see them venture into interactive experiences.

Excited for more levels!
